name: Baked Ricotta
method: Serves 4 500 g ricotta 2 organic eggs 100 g parmigiano a few fresh oregano leaves 1 chilli, deseeded and finely sliced salt and ground black pepper
Mix all the ingredients together well in a bowl. Butter an ovenproof dish, place the mixture in the dish and bake for about 25 minutes until golden and puffed up.
